step_rationale: Interleukin-1 receptor-associated kinase 3; TLR/IL-1R signaling regulator attenuating innate immune activation.
mechanism: IRAK3 negatively regulates TLR-driven inflammatory signaling, controlling monocyte activation and plaque inflammation in acute coronary events.

references.title: Identification of core genes shared by ischemic stroke and myocardial infarction using an integrated approach.
Assessment and diagnostic relevance of novel serum biomarkers for early decision of ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
